prompt:
I want to add reverb and delay to my pattern in Strudel. How do I do that?

```javascript
note("c e g b").s("piano")
```

assertions.description: Response shows .room() with an example value
assertions.check: Response includes .room() with an example value

assertions.description: Response shows .delay() with an example value
assertions.check: Response includes .delay() with an example value

assertions.description: Response explains what the room or delay value controls
assertions.check: Response explains what the room or delay value controls (e.g., amount, 0-1)

assertions.description: Response contains a code example using note("c e g b").s("piano") with room and/or delay chained
assertions.check: Response contains a code example using note("c e g b").s("piano") with room and/or delay chained
